summary: Conduct a comprehensive SEO audit covering technical health, content gaps, and competitive positioning with prioritized remediation.

inputs.name: target_keywords
inputs.description: Primary keyword themes to evaluate ranking and gaps.

outputs.name: audit_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive findings covering technical, on-page, and off-page SEO.

outputs.name: issue_prioritization
outputs.description: Ranked list of issues by impact, effort, and urgency.

outputs.name: remediation_roadmap
outputs.description: Phased action plan with expected outcomes.

budget.notes: Focus on actionable findings with clear prioritization.

gates.rule: Confirm the request is an SEO audit rather than a paid search or social audit.
Require site URL and target keywords before beginning analysis.
Deliver audit with technical, content, and competitive sections plus prioritized roadmap.

steps.action: Analyze crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, and site architecture.
Compare content coverage against target keywords and competitors.
Benchmark domain authority, backlink profile, and keyword overlap.
Rank issues by impact and produce phased remediation roadmap.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing SEO reports, analytics exports, and site data.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Produce audit report and remediation roadmap.

verification.method: Check audit covers crawl, index, speed, and architecture.
Check keyword gaps are mapped to content opportunities.
Check remediation plan has impact-effort ranking.

success_criteria: Audit covers technical, on-page, and off-page SEO dimensions.
Issues are prioritized with clear impact and effort estimates.
Remediation roadmap provides actionable next steps.

rollback.when: If audit data is incomplete or site is inaccessible, revert to scope confirmation.
